global.title: U.N.: "Clock is ticking" to prevent global food crisis - CNN
global.summary: A U.N. warning says the window to prevent a wider global food crisis is narrowing. The concern points to mounting strain on vulnerable regions already facing instability and hunger.
global.whyItMatters: Food insecurity often becomes a pastoral issue quickly through missions, prayer, and local compassion responses.

global.title: Back to square one? Markets bet Iran war is over - Reuters
global.summary: Reuters reports investors are increasingly betting on de-escalation after the Iran war shock, even as oil, gas, fertilizer, and jet fuel pressures remain elevated. Markets appear hopeful, but the energy squeeze is not fully resolved.
global.whyItMatters: This shapes inflation, household stress, and the emotional climate people bring into church conversations and counseling.

global.title: NGO welcomes Spain’s 'straightforward' migrant regularization process - Reuters
global.summary: Spain’s migrant regularization process is being welcomed by an NGO as unusually clear and accessible. The story highlights a fresh policy angle in Europe’s ongoing migration pressures.
global.whyItMatters: Migration remains a discipleship and hospitality issue for churches thinking about welcome, justice, and social cohesion.

canadian.title: Ultraprocessed foods are turning human thighs into well-marbled steaks - CTV News
canadian.summary: CTV highlights emerging health concerns around ultraprocessed foods and the way diet may be reshaping body composition and long-term wellness. The broader theme is preventable health harm tied to everyday habits.
canadian.whyItMatters: Pastors regularly shepherd people through health anxiety, family habits, and stewardship of body and community life.

persecutedChurch.title: China raises pressure on underground Catholics to join official church, Human Rights Watch finds - AP News
persecutedChurch.summary: Human Rights Watch says pressure is increasing on underground Catholics in China to join the state-approved church. The report points to escalating intimidation of clergy and worshippers despite the Vatican-China agreement.
persecutedChurch.whyItMatters: This is a clear call to pray for the global church and to remember believers facing pressure for faithful worship.

persecutedChurch.title: BISHOP ROBERT BARRON: The war on Christians is real and the world can no longer stay silent - Fox News
persecutedChurch.summary: Bishop Robert Barron argues that anti-Christian persecution remains severe worldwide, especially in parts of Africa, Asia, and the Middle East. He frames the issue as both urgent and too often ignored.
persecutedChurch.whyItMatters: It can help Kris lead informed prayer, global awareness, and solidarity with suffering believers.

leadership.title: How Emotional Intelligence Can Help Activate Your ‘Culture Code’ - Forbes
leadership.summary: Forbes argues that emotional intelligence is what turns stated values into lived culture, especially during change. The piece emphasizes candor, empathy, and visible progress as trust-building practices.
leadership.whyItMatters: Useful for leading staff and volunteers through change without losing trust or clarity.

goodNews.title: Overlooked football player embodies the meaning of grit - CBS News
goodNews.summary: CBS features an overlooked football player whose perseverance and character stand out more than hype. It is a simple story of resilience, dignity, and steady effort.
goodNews.whyItMatters: A helpful illustration for sermons or encouragement around perseverance, identity, and unseen faithfulness.
